evals.name: validated-dto
evals.prompt: Create a DTO with validation for order creation — SKU, quantity, currency, list of tags, delivery address
evals.expected_output: Java record with @Valid annotation and validators (@NotBlank, @Size, @Range, @Pattern, @NotEmpty, @Valid for nested Address)

evals.name: resilient-service
evals.prompt: Create a service for calling an external API with timeout, retry, circuit breaker, and fallback
evals.expected_output: Java class with @Timeout, @Retry, @CircuitBreaker, @Fallback annotations, non-final class, fallback method

evals.name: scheduled-jobs
evals.prompt: Create scheduled jobs for periodic data cleanup and a nightly report

evals.name: cache-service
evals.prompt: Create a cache service for orders with @Cacheable, @CachePut, @CacheInvalidate
evals.expected_output: Java interface extends CaffeineCache + service with @Cacheable, @CachePut, @CacheInvalidate (including allEntries)

evals.name: logged-service
evals.prompt: Create a service with method logging using @Log, @Log.in, @Log.out, @Mdc
evals.expected_output: Java class with @Log for entry/exit, @Log.in for entry-only, @Log.out for result-only, @Mdc for context, @Log.off for hiding parameters

evals.name: validated-service
evals.prompt: Create a service with argument validation using @Validate on methods
evals.expected_output: Java class with @Validate on methods, argument validation, ViolationException on error
